# kvindo_image_schedule (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kvindo_vpc" "main" {
  metadata = {
    name = "my-vpc"
  }
  spec = {
    hosting_provider_id = "01abc123def456gh789012345"
  }
}

resource "kvindo_vpc_subnet" "main" {
  metadata = {
    name = "my-subnet"
  }
  spec = {
    vpc_id    = kvindo_vpc.main.id
    ipv4_cidr = "10.0.1.0/24"
  }
}

resource "kvindo_vm" "main" {
  metadata = {
    name = "my-vm"
  }
  spec = {
    offer_id      = "01vm0ffr123456789012345"
    image_id      = "01img123456789012345678"
    vpc_subnet_id = kvindo_vpc_subnet.main.id
  }
}

# Snapshot the VM daily at 3am, keep the last 7 snapshots
resource "kvindo_image_schedule" "example" {
  metadata = {
    name = "daily-backup"
  }
  spec = {
    vm_id           = kvindo_vm.main.id
    enabled         = true
    schedule_format = "cron"
    schedule        = "0 3 * * *"
    retention_count = 7
  }
}
```
